debug_info.goal:
F : Type
inst✝² : Field F
Input Output : TypeMap
inst✝¹ : ProvableType Input
inst✝ : ProvableType Output
circuit : ElaboratedCircuit F Input Output
Assumptions : Input F → Prop
Spec : Input F → Output F → Prop
i₀ : ℕ
env : Environment F
input_var : Var Input F
input : Input F
h_input : eval env input_var = input
h_assumptions : Assumptions input
h_holds : ConstraintsHold.Soundness env (ElaboratedCircuit.main input_var i₀).2
⊢ Spec input (eval env (ElaboratedCircuit.output input_var i₀))

failed_attempts:
have h₁ := h_holds
  simp [ElaboratedCircuit] at h₁ ⊢
  <;>
  (try simp_all) <;>
  (try aesop) <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try ring_nf at *) <;>
  (try linarith)
  <;>
  aesop

<;>
  (try
    simp_all [ElaboratedCircuit, ModuleFrontend, ModuleM, Program, SymbolicSim])
  <;>
  (try
    aesop)
  <;>
  (try
    just_contra)
  <;>
  (try
    linarith)
  <;>
  (try
    ring_nf at *)
  <;>
  (try
    field_simp at *)
  <;>
  (try
    norm_num at *)
  <;>
  (try
    simp_all [TypeMap])
  <;>
  (try
    tauto)
  <;>
  (try
    aesop)
  <;>
  (try
    just_contra)
  <;>
  (try
    linarith)

simp_all [ElaboratedCircuit,noConfusion]
  <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try tauto) <;>
  (try ring_nf at *) <;>
  (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff]) <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try nlinarith)
  <;>
  (try
    {
      -- Handle any remaining logical implications or contradictions
      exfalso
      simp_all
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      -- If no contradiction is found, use the trivial solution to prove the goal
      trivial
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      -- Use any remaining assumptions to finalize the proof
      aesop
    })
